'''fogadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:glacimarine|glacimarine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glacimarine|glacimarine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fogadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadithi|fogadithi]] || [[word:fogadiji|fogadiji]] || [[word:fogadishi|fogadishi]] || [[word:fogadiki|fogadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogaduthuthu|fogaduthuthu]] || [[word:fogadujuju|fogadujuju]] || [[word:fogadushushu|fogadushushu]] || [[word:fogadukuku|fogadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogaduthu|fogaduthu]] || [[word:fogaduju|fogaduju]] || [[word:fogadushu|fogadushu]] || [[word:fogaduku|fogaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadufthuf|fogadufthuf]] || [[word:fogadufjuf|fogadufjuf]] || [[word:fogadufshuf|fogadufshuf]] || [[word:fogadufkuf|fogadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadethe|fogadethe]] || [[word:fogadeje|fogadeje]] || [[word:fogadeshe|fogadeshe]] || [[word:fogadeke|fogadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogadothotho|fogadothotho]] || [[word:fogadojojo|fogadojojo]] || [[word:fogadoshosho|fogadoshosho]] || [[word:fogadokoko|fogadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogadotho|fogadotho]] || [[word:fogadojo|fogadojo]] || [[word:fogadosho|fogadosho]] || [[word:fogadoko|fogadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadofthof|fogadofthof]] || [[word:fogadofjof|fogadofjof]] || [[word:fogadofshof|fogadofshof]] || [[word:fogadofkof|fogadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfthĂŻf|fogadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfjĂŻf|fogadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfshĂŻf|fogadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfkĂŻf|fogadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fogadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fogadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fogadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fogadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfthĂŻf|fogadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfjĂŻf|fogadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfshĂŻf|fogadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfkĂŻf|fogadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfthĂŻf|fogadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfjĂŻf|fogadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfshĂŻf|fogadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fogadĂŻfkĂŻf|fogadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogadĂŠthĂŠ|fogadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fogadĂŠjĂŠ|fogadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fogadĂŠshĂŠ|fogadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fogadĂŠkĂŠ|fogadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogadathatha|fogadathatha]] || [[word:fogadajaja|fogadajaja]] || [[word:fogadashasha|fogadashasha]] || [[word:fogadakaka|fogadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogadatha|fogadatha]] || [[word:fogadaja|fogadaja]] || [[word:fogadasha|fogadasha]] || [[word:fogadaka|fogadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogadafthaf|fogadafthaf]] || [[word:fogadafjaf|fogadafjaf]] || [[word:fogadafshaf|fogadafshaf]] || [[word:fogadafkaf|fogadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fogadasha|fogadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogadshĂ«sha|fogadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogadrosha|fogadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogadmusha|fogadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogadyasha|fogadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogadnkshĂ«sha|gofogadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogadnkrosha|gofogadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogadnkmusha|gofogadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogadnkyasha|gofogadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fogagadasha|fogagadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogagadshĂ«sha|fogagadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogagadrosha|fogagadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogagadmusha|fogagadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogagadyasha|fogagadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogagadnkshĂ«sha|gofogagadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogagadnkrosha|gofogagadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogagadnkmusha|gofogagadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogagadnkyasha|gofogagadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fegĂŠdasha|fegĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fegĂŠdshĂ«sha|fegĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fegĂŠdrosha|fegĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fegĂŠdmusha|fegĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fegĂŠdyasha|fegĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofegĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gofegĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofegĂŠdnkrosha|gofegĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofegĂŠdnkmusha|gofegĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofegĂŠdnkyasha|gofegĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fogfadasha|fogfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogfadshĂ«sha|fogfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogfadrosha|fogfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogfadmusha|fogfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogfadyasha|fogfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogfadnkshĂ«sha|gofogfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogfadnkrosha|gofogfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogfadnkmusha|gofogfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogfadnkyasha|gofogfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
